subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting. He hath ever been veiled in the ancient eternity of His Essence
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم لم یزل کان غنیا فی ذاته و الذی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
